blockers.description: Plan 05.2-02 transcription premise invalidated. Original plan scoped 7 SY17-SY23 PDF transcriptions; discovery during execution: (a) the executor's prepared URLs used wrong Ofgem URL stem (transparency-document/ vs publications/) and were fabricated slugs that 404, (b) Ofgem actually publishes machine-readable XLSX dataset companions for 6 of 7 reports, materially stronger provenance posture than transcription. Plan needs revision before continuation.
blockers.workaround: /gsd-plan-phase 05.2 --revise (or recreate Plan 05.2-02 manually around XLSX downloads)

human_actions_pending.action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 05.2 to regenerate Plan 05.2-02 around XLSX downloads (or manually edit the plan file to swap transcription tasks for XLSX download + parse tasks)
human_actions_pending.context: CONTEXT.md commit b934492 captures the full URL inventory + re-plan implications. Re-plan should consume that section directly.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide SY17 fate (PDF-only — transcribe vs defer)
human_actions_pending.context: SY17 is the only year without an XLSX companion. Either keep manual transcription for that one year, or defer SY17 alongside the deferred station-level data (REF Constable benchmark covers SY17 implicitly — its £bn total is in tests/fixtures/benchmarks.yaml). Re-plan must record the choice.

decisions.decision: Pause Plan 05.2-02 mid-execution and re-plan around XLSX downloads
decisions.rationale: Original plan's transcription premise is invalidated by discovery that 6 of 7 Ofgem RO annual reports ship machine-readable XLSX dataset companions. Continuing with manual transcription would (a) be wasted effort vs available canonical data, (b) introduce transcription error risk vs sha256-pinned XLSX, (c) leave Plan/code drift if the plan is silently revised inline.

decisions.decision: Keep Wave 1 (Plan 05.2-01) commits as final — they are not affected
decisions.rationale: Plan 05.2-01 outputs (sidecar sources[] kwarg, ofgem_aggregate.py skeleton, conftest dormant hook) are substrate the revised Plan 05.2-02 still consumes. Five commits: 6677618, 7dc303f, c607d84, 74a6c15, 9c9d2c6 + metadata 66934f0.

12-year XLSX is canonical Ofgem-published raw data covering SY02-SY16. Its sha256-pinned sidecar is the same provenance posture the revised Plan 05.2-02 will use for SY18-SY23 XLSX. No reason to revert.

decisions.decision: Mark commit a720ae7 (transcription-skeleton CSVs) as SUPERSEDED
decisions.rationale: Skeleton CSVs were prepped for human PDF transcription that won't happen. Column shape may survive into the revised plan (XLSX-driven CSV emission could use the same column names) but file content gets replaced. Re-plan decides revert-vs-replace-in-place.

next_action: User runs /gsd-plan-phase 05.2 to regenerate Plan 05.2-02 around XLSX downloads. After re-plan completes, run /gsd-execute-phase 05.2 to resume.
context_notes: Phase paused after Wave 1 success + partial Wave 2 progress. Test suite at 175 passed + 14 skipped + 22 xfailed (Wave 1 baseline; Wave 2 added no tests). Working tree clean post-pause-commit. The CONTEXT.md SY17–SY23 discovery section (commit b934492) is the canonical handoff for the re-plan — it carries the full URL inventory, file size table, and structural implications. The original 16 D-decisions in CONTEXT.md still hold; the re-plan adjusts SC #5 wording from 'transcription' to 'ingestion' and reshapes Plan 05.2-02 task structure but leaves D-01 through D-16 untouched.
